headline: Seagate (STX) Is Up 25.1% After Big Earnings Beat And Margin Gains Has The Bull Case Changed?
summary: In the past quarter, Seagate Technology Holdings reported earnings per share of US$3.11 on revenue of US$2.83 billion, surpassing analyst expectations on both measures. Beyond the headline beat, the company’s consistent outperformance of earnings estimates and improving profit margins point to a strengthening operational recovery and growing investor confidence. We’ll now examine how Seagate’s stronger-than-expected earnings and margin improvement may influence its existing investment...

headline: Wall Street Holds Its Ground While Trump's Iran Deadline Ticks Down
summary: There's something almost surreal about watching markets grind higher while a sitting U.S. president warns he can level an entire country "in one night." Yet that's exactly where we found ourselves on Monday.
